title: EvoAgentX: Self-Evolving Ecosystem of AI Agents
snippet: Open-source framework for building, evaluating, and evolving LLM-based agents. Modular architecture with TextGrad, AFlow, MIPRO optimization. 7.44% HotPotQA F1 improvement, 10% MBPP pass@1 gain. EMNLP 2025 demo paper.

metadata.llm_reason: Core self-evolving agent framework with automated workflow optimization and published paper.

title: Darwin Gödel Machine: Open-Ended Evolution of Self-Improving Agents
snippet: Self-improving coding agent that rewrites its own code. Improved SWE-bench from 20% to 50%, Polyglot from 14.2% to 30.7%. Sakana AI / UBC. arXiv 2505.22954.

metadata.llm_reason: Landmark self-improving system with empirical validation and dramatic performance gains.

title: Hyperagents: Recursive Metacognitive Self-Improvement
snippet: Meta/Facebook Research. Self-referential agents with editable meta-agent + task agent. Improves across coding, paper review, robotics, Olympiad math. arXiv 2603.19461. March 2026.

metadata.llm_reason: State-of-the-art self-referential self-improvement framework from Meta Research.

title: OpenSpace: Self-Evolving Skill Engine for AI Agents
snippet: HKUDS self-evolving skill engine with FIX/DERIVED/CAPTURED modes. 46% token reduction, 4.2x income improvement on GDPVal. Cloud-based skill community for collective intelligence.

metadata.llm_reason: Novel self-evolving skill engine with collective intelligence and strong efficiency gains.

title: Agent0: Self-Evolving Agents from Zero Data
snippet: Co-evolution framework: curriculum agent creates harder tasks, executor learns to solve them. Zero external data dependency. 18% math reasoning improvement, 24% general reasoning boost on Qwen3-8B.

metadata.llm_reason: Novel zero-data self-evolution through symbiotic competition between curriculum and executor agents.

title: AgentEvolver: Efficient Self-Evolving Agent System
snippet: ModelScope/Alibaba. Self-questioning + self-navigating + self-attributing. Curiosity-driven task generation, experience reuse, differentiated rewards. Game Arena for multi-agent social reasoning.

metadata.llm_reason: End-to-end self-evolving training framework from Alibaba with three synergistic mechanisms.

title: Yunjue Agent: Zero-Start In-Situ Self-Evolving Agent System
snippet: Fully reproducible self-evolving agent starting from empty tool library. Multi-agent architecture for runtime tool synthesis, validation, reuse. SOTA on DSQA, FSC, xSciQA. January 2026.

metadata.llm_reason: Novel in-situ self-evolving paradigm with zero-start tool synthesis.

title: MUSE: Experience-Driven Self-Evolving Agent for Long-Horizon Tasks
snippet: Hierarchical memory module with closed-loop learning. SOTA on The Agent Company Benchmark (51.78%). Experience exhibits zero-shot transfer. October 2025.

metadata.llm_reason: #1 on Agent Company Benchmark. Experience-driven self-evolution with strong generalization.

title: MemRL: Self-Evolving Agents via Runtime RL on Episodic Memory
snippet: Non-parametric self-evolution via RL on episodic memory. Two-Phase Retrieval with Q-value learning. Outperforms SOTA on HLE, BigCodeBench, ALFWorld. No weight updates needed.

metadata.llm_reason: Novel non-parametric self-evolution approach using runtime RL on episodic memory.

title: MemSkill: Learning and Evolving Memory Skills for Self-Evolving Agents
snippet: Reframes memory operations as learnable, evolvable skills. Controller learns skill selection, designer evolves skill set via periodic review. Generalizes across settings.

metadata.llm_reason: Novel approach treating memory operations as evolvable skills with closed-loop improvement.

title: MemGen: Weaving Generative Latent Memory for Self-Evolving Agents (ICLR 2026)
snippet: Memory trigger + memory weaver for machine-native latent memory. Spontaneously evolves planning/procedural/working memory. Outperforms ExpeL and AWM by up to 38.22%. ICLR 2026.

metadata.llm_reason: ICLR 2026 paper. Self-emerging memory faculties with strong benchmark improvements.

title: A Comprehensive Survey of Self-Evolving AI Agents (arXiv 2508.07407)
snippet: Major survey by Jinyuan Fang et al. (15 authors). Framework: System Inputs, Agent System, Environment, Optimisers. Covers domain-specific evolution in biomedicine, programming, finance. August 2025.

metadata.llm_reason: Comprehensive survey directly on self-evolving AI agents with systematic framework.

title: A Survey of Self-Evolving Agents: What, When, How, and Where to Evolve
snippet: Survey examining self-evolving agents on the path to ASI. Covers static LLM limitations and adaptive evolution in open-ended interactive environments. July 2025.

title: AI Agents: Evolution, Architecture, and Real-World Applications
snippet: March 2025 paper examining evolution from rule-based to LLM-based agents. Proposes evaluation framework balancing effectiveness, efficiency, robustness, safety.

metadata.llm_reason: Comprehensive agent evolution survey with evaluation framework.

title: Agentic AI: A Comprehensive Survey of Architectures, Applications, and Future Directions
snippet: PRISMA-based systematic review of 90 studies (2018-2025). Categorizes agentic systems into Symbolic/Classical and Neural/Generative paradigms. October 2025.

metadata.llm_reason: Systematic review covering both paradigms of agentic AI with broad scope.

title: V-STaR: Training Verifiers for Self-Taught Reasoners (COLM 2024)
snippet: Uses both correct and incorrect self-generated solutions to train a verifier via DPO. 4-17% accuracy improvement over existing self-improvement methods. COLM 2024.

metadata.llm_reason: Verified LOW-confidence item: extends STaR with verifier training. COLM 2024 publication confirmed.

title: OS-Copilot: Generalist Computer Agents with Self-Improvement
snippet: Framework for generalist OS agents. Creates FRIDAY agent. Planner + configurator + actor with self-correction. 35% improvement on GAIA benchmark. Accumulates skills from previous tasks.

metadata.llm_reason: Verified LOW-confidence item: self-improving OS agent with skill accumulation.

title: Agent Hospital: A Simulacrum of Hospital with Evolvable Medical Agents

title: PromptBreeder: Self-Referential Self-Improvement Via Prompt Evolution

metadata.llm_reason: Self-referential prompt evolution — directly relevant as a self-evolving approach.

title: EvoPrompt: Connecting LLMs with Evolutionary Algorithms for Prompt Optimization (ICLR 2024)

title: GEPA: Optimize prompts with AI-powered Reflective Text Evolution

title: Beyond Prompt Engineering: TEXTGRAD and DSPy Next Generation AI
